title: rubus scabricaulis
intro: Rubus scabricaulis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus scabricaulis include its potential to help lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies such as jams and jellies due to its sweet and slightly tart flavor.
